name: Song Format Validation
description: Validates that new song files contain all required sections (Style Prompt, Exclusions, Title tag, Production/Vocal Direction blocks, Production Notes)

then.prompt: Validate this new song file contains all required sections: 1) Style Prompt (comma-separated descriptors), 2) [Exclusions: ...], 3) [Title: Song Name] tag, 4) [Production Direction: ...] block, 5) [Vocal Direction: ...] block, 6) Section tags (at minimum Verse + Chorus), 7) Production Notes with Key, Tempo, Time Sig, Chord Progression (Nashville + actual), Vocal, Instruments, Dynamics, Hook Type, Rhyme Scheme, Emotional Arc. Flag missing sections with ⚠️ MISSING or confirm ✅ if all present. Also check Style Prompt under 1000 chars and lyrics estimatable under 5000 chars.
